title: Rescue in a Flooded Cave

segments.title: Main headline
segments.audioText: Rescuers are racing to reach seven villagers trapped for a week in a flooded cave.
segments.transcript: Rescuers are racing to reach seven villagers trapped for a week in a flooded cave.
segments.translationZh: 救援人員正趕住接觸七名被困喺水浸洞穴一星期嘅村民。

points.label: rescuers
points.explanationZh: 救援人員；新聞常用嚟講消防、搜救隊、志願救援隊。

points.label: are racing to reach
points.explanationZh: 唔係真係跑步，意思係『正爭分奪秒趕去接觸/抵達』。

points.label: trapped for a week
points.explanationZh: 被困咗一星期；for + 一段時間，講持續多久。

segments.title: Difficult condition
segments.audioText: They are cramming through narrow, flooded corridors with very little room to move.
segments.transcript: They are cramming through narrow, flooded corridors with very little room to move.
segments.translationZh: 佢哋要迫入狹窄又水浸嘅通道，幾乎冇乜空間郁動。

points.label: cramming through
points.explanationZh: 迫住穿過；有『空間好窄，要硬擠入去』嘅感覺。

points.label: flooded corridors
points.explanationZh: 被水浸嘅通道；corridor 唔只係大廈走廊，洞穴通道都可以用。

points.label: very little room
points.explanationZh: room 呢度唔係房間，係『空間』。

segments.title: Why it matters
segments.audioText: Officials say the rescue is dangerous, but every hour is important.
segments.transcript: Officials say the rescue is dangerous, but every hour is important.
segments.translationZh: 官員表示救援行動好危險，但每一個鐘都好重要。

points.label: officials say
points.explanationZh: 新聞入面常見 opening，用嚟引述官方消息。

points.label: the rescue is dangerous
points.explanationZh: rescue 可以係名詞，指成個救援行動。

points.label: every hour is important
points.explanationZh: every + 單數名詞；強調每一個都重要。

sentences: Rescuers are racing to reach seven villagers trapped for a week in a flooded cave.
They are cramming through narrow, flooded corridors with very little room to move.
Officials say the rescue is dangerous, but every hour is important.

vocabulary.example: People crammed into the small room.
The corridor was full of water.

phrases.meaningZh: 爭分奪秒趕去接觸/抵達
phrases.example: Teams are racing to reach the trapped workers.
There was very little room inside the tunnel.

notes: 今日重點：新聞英文好多時一開頭就放 who + action + problem。
跟讀時先練 chunk：rescuers are racing / to reach seven villagers / trapped for a week。

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 先聽一次，然後逐 chunk 跟讀。
speakingPractice.text: Rescuers are racing to reach seven villagers.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 用同一句型換一個新聞主題講返。
